name: White Chocolate Whipped Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring cream to a simmer in a heavy small saucepan over low heat.
2. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Add the chopped white chocolate and stir until smooth.
4. Pour into a bowl and allow to cool completely, stirring occasionally.
5. Refrigerate until well chilled, stirring occasionally.
6. Using an electric mixer, beat the mixture until stiff peaks form.
Makes 2 cups
Can be prepared up to 2 hours in advance; refrigerate until ready to serve.
